reviews.review_description: there is no net and you cannot place the screen in your room where you want, so it is 1 star

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review. To position the hoop, you will have to look at the wall you want the hoop on. If you still notice this problem, please describe which device you are using with screenshot if possible in an email to support@uralstech.in

reviews.review_description: The game isn't even worth 2 dollars much less 5. It's not user friendly at all and you can't position the rim the way you need to.  Can't shoot the ball or anything. Please fix this game

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review. To position the hoop, you will have to look at the wall you want the hoop on. We are not seeing this issue of not being able to shoot the ball on our side (on a Quest 2). If you still notice this problem, please describe which device you are using in an email to info@uralstech.in
